overall.description: Nighttime gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a dystopian urban street illuminated by neon signs and streetlights. The video transitions from an initial first-person perspective to third-person follow, tracking a player character with distinctive red hair as they navigate past abandoned vehicles, trash accumulations, and industrial dumpsters while approaching a massive intersection dominated by red neon structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with abandoned vehicle and construction barriers

agents.ego_description: moving steadily along the sidewalk in first-person perspective, passing an abandoned blue van and concrete construction barriers

entered.detail: damaged blue commercial van with open side doors parked on the sidewalk edge
gray concrete construction barrier blocking part of the sidewalk
tall wooden utility pole with electrical wires running across
tall palm trees silhouetted against the dark night sky
large illuminated advertisement billboard with red and white graphics
cluster of blue and black garbage bags accumulated on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a dark urban sidewalk at night. An abandoned blue van sits on the right near concrete barriers, while trash bags line the path ahead. Streetlights and a distant billboard provide the primary illumination as the camera moves steadily forward through this sparse, empty street scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with industrial dumpsters and neon-lit storefronts

events.description: camera perspective switches from first-person to third-person follow as the red-haired character comes into view
character stops walking and looks around briefly before continuing

agents.ego_description: the player character with distinctive red hair walks ahead, pausing momentarily to survey the surroundings near green dumpsters

entered.detail: player character with bright red hair wearing dark clothing and yellow boots
large green industrial dumpsters overflowing with garbage bags
commercial building facade illuminated with pink and red neon lights
tall pole with red traffic signals visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to third-person follow behind a red-haired character walking through the neon-lit street. The character pauses briefly to look around near green industrial dumpsters before continuing. The environment features scattered trash, utility poles, and distant neon signage while maintaining the dark, artificial lighting of the urban night.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching major intersection with massive red neon overhead structure

events.description: large red neon structure becomes prominently visible ahead as the character approaches the intersection

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk steadily toward the intersection dominated by the red neon structure, passing parked vehicles on the left

entered.detail: massive overhead architectural structure with bright red neon lighting forming a distinctive shape
row of parked vehicles along the left street curb

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking toward a major intersection where a massive red neon structure dominates the skyline. Parked cars line the left side of the street while the neon-lit buildings on the right become more prominent. The scene opens up into a wider urban space as the character approaches the intersection, with the red neon glow becoming the primary visual focus against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous movement through a dark, desolate urban corridor that gradually opens into a vibrant, neon-drenched intersection. It begins from a first-person perspective walking along a dim sidewalk past an abandoned blue van and scattered trash bags under the glow of distant billboards. As the camera shifts to a third-person follow, it tracks a red-haired character who pauses briefly beside green industrial dumpsters amidst a landscape of utility poles and artificial night lighting. The scene then expands as the character advances toward a wider urban space, passing parked cars while the surrounding buildings become more prominent. Finally, the perspective leads directly toward a massive red neon structure that dominates the skyline, casting a powerful crimson glow over the entire intersection.
